what_it_is: The 50-script motor layer that drives the governance SSOT: it runs the Mac/CI brain autorun loop (verify → self-heal → matrix → gated promote), the P0-PGR shadow dispatch pipeline (evidence → lint → route → receipt), the weekly workflow census + agent-read staleness governance cycles, auth/Supabase e2e probes, receipt-ledger audits, and heuristic chess-risk pre-checks. Every motor is receipt-emitting and registry-driven; most transitions are deterministic shell/Python with no LLM calls, so shadow cost is a true 0.0.

current_state.note: Mixed maturity. LIVE + scheduled: brain_loop_autorun (CI cron */30 + Mac launchd), workflow_census (weekly), agent_read_staleness (weekly Mon), sg_auth_surface_probe (every 6h). SCAFFOLDED/shadow-only: entire p0pgr_* pipeline — shadow-cycle CI is workflow_dispatch ONLY, the cron is commented pending a FOUNDER-UNLOCK-R3 receipt, and the cycle does route-decision-only with zero execution (matches memory: P0-PGR runtime scaffolded, execution locked). LOCKED for sandbox purposes: promote_brain_worker --autonomous-deploy (touches live Cloudflare sourcea-brain-chat-v1 Worker via promotion_gate) and the autonomous-hold path in brain_loop_autorun. STALE/stub: write_roi_heartbeat emits all-"unknown" metrics; living_system_chain_validate is an LS-021 stub. audit_* tools always exit 0 (surface findings, never gate).

key_assets.purpose: Core 30m autorun motor. Sequences _run_step self-heal → parallel candidates → e2e matrix, then either OBSERVE_ONLY or (founder-flag) autonomous promote. Reads flags under ~/.sina/, writes receipts/brain-loop-autorun-*.json. This is the heartbeat of the whole layer.

Shared sourced lib for all brain_* / promote / validate shell motors: SourceA worktree resolution, TCC/SIGKILL (rc 137/139) handling, overlap-lock (brain_acquire_lock), BRAIN_PYTHON pinning. Single point every shell motor depends on.

Deploy gate wrapper — resolves candidate ref/sha from live verifier receipt, invokes gates/promotion_gate.py with confirm-each-time or --autonomous-deploy to the secondary CF account. The one script that reaches live Cloudflare; LOCKED for sandbox work.

Self-heal tick: compares live verifier receipt candidate_sha256/ref vs local bundle_sha256 + git HEAD (ancestor logic) to decide skip vs reverify, optionally re-triggers /run. Writes brain-self-heal-tick receipt.

SSOT loader for data/brain_domain_sandboxes_v1.json — get_sandbox, resolve_sourcea_root, git_ref, bundle_sha256. Imported by self-heal, trigger_verifier_run, parallel candidates. Registry is the plug-point for new brain sandboxes.

P0-PGR shadow cycle motor: evidence → load packet → lint → ROUTE-DECISION-ONLY → schema-validated loop-state receipt (receipts/p0pgr/). Non-binary verdicts (PASS/REPAIR_CANDIDATE/DEGRADED); bad packet becomes a repair_candidates file, lane never stops. Zero execution in Phase-0.

Packet linter: jsonschema + 7 semantic rules (delivery fields, HARD_BLOCK enum, CLOUD_ONLY/cloud_safe, HYBRID_MAC reqs, FOUNDER_ONLY for deploy/authority, P0-CORE leak fingerprints). HARD_BLOCK_REASONS/DELIVERY_REQUIRED are the rule tables.

Deterministic ROI ranker (move M10): WEIGHTS + authored FACTORS table (0-1) over campaign moves → ranked cloud-only queue + HOLD_CLOUD_UNSAFE for Mac-bound. Emits receipts/p0pgr/phase2_queue_v1.json. Recommendation only — does not flip dispatch flags.

Crawls all motors (GH Actions, CF workers, launchd), classifies each by which receipt it serves + value_class, writes Supabase + census receipt. Reads data/automation_surface_inventory + workflow_census_extensions + value_class_rules. Weekly CI.

Scans receipts/ for collision/anomaly classes (malformed JSON, missing timestamp, near-simultaneous different-identity receipts within 5s, duplicate basename across dirs). Always exit 0 — audit, not gate. TIMESTAMP_KEYS + checks are extensible.

Heuristic risk pre-check: reads mission/raw_move JSON, matches RISK_WORDS (clean/simplify/…) + IRREVERSIBLE_HINTS (delete/send/spend/…), emits a CHESS_PASS skeleton with likely_misread/second-move-risk and PROCEED/PROCEED_WITH_PATCH/ASK_IF_IRREVERSIBLE action. Standalone stdin/file CLI.

Alive-doc law motor: reads data/agent_read_surfaces_v1.json + stale_law_guard_patterns, flags stale governance pointers, files into governance_stale_pointer_queue, emits receipt. Weekly cycle via run_agent_read_governance_cycle_v1.sh.
Weekly ROI heartbeat receipt. Currently a STUB — every metric is literal "unknown" (no fabrication). Clear target for a real collector.

extension_points: data/workflow_census_extensions_v1.json — declarative registry of extra motors (CF workers, Railway, GH workflows, traffic probes) merged into the census with no code change; add an object to register a new loop + its receipt_glob + value_class.
data/brain_domain_sandboxes_v1.json (via brain_domain_registry_v1.py) — add a sandbox_id and self-heal + run_parallel_brain_candidates + trigger_verifier_run pick it up automatically.
p0pgr_phase2_rank_v1.py FACTORS/WEIGHTS tables — authored constants; a new campaign move needs one FACTORS row to be ranked (currently hardcoded in-file).
p0pgr_packet_lint_v1.py HARD_BLOCK_REASONS / DELIVERY_REQUIRED / the 7 numbered semantic checks — add a rule to tighten packet governance.
p0pgr_cycle_v1.py ROUTE_VERDICT map — execution_mode → route decision; extend to add routing modes.
chess_pass_cli_v1.py RISK_WORDS / IRREVERSIBLE_HINTS lists — extend the heuristic vocabulary.
audit_receipt_ledger_v1.py check functions + TIMESTAMP_KEYS — add new receipt-anomaly detectors.
brain_loop_autorun_v1.sh _run_step sequence — add a governed step to the 30m cycle (self-heal/parallel/matrix pattern).
receipts/ + receipts/p0pgr/ — the common bus; any new motor plugs in by writing a schema-tagged JSON receipt that the ledger/census/rollup can read.
write_roi_heartbeat_v1.py metrics dict — replace "unknown" values with a collector reading real receipts/Supabase.

buildable_ideas.idea: Dead-motor detector: a read-only motor that cross-references each census loop's receipt_glob (data/workflow_census_extensions_v1.json + inventory) against actual files in receipts/, flagging any loop with no matching receipt in N days as a silent/dead motor and emitting a census-liveness receipt. Directly answers the file's own 'which receipt does this loop serve?' question with evidence of whether it actually served one.

ROI heartbeat populator: replace write_roi_heartbeat's all-"unknown" metrics dict with a collector that derives receipt_chain_verifier, pattern_exports_per_week, and blocker_count from real receipts/ files (count by schema, newest brain-loop-autorun gate_note, p0pgr repair_candidates backlog). Keeps 'unknown stays unknown' for genuinely missing sources.

Autonomous-pause explainer: read-only brain_hold_report_v1.py that reads the ~/.sina/enforcement/brain-autonomous-hold-v1.flag reason string plus the last N receipts/brain-loop-autorun-*.json (gate_note, self_heal_rc/parallel_rc/matrix_rc, mac_sigkill) and renders a simple HTML timeline of why autonomous deploy is held or last promoted. Pure observability over the autorun receipts; never touches the promote path.

Chess-pass → packet-lint bridge: a shadow wrapper that runs chess_pass_cli over a packet's task/context_summary text and injects its likely_misread / IRREVERSIBLE_HINTS findings as extra REPAIR_CANDIDATE reasons in the lint result, so ambiguous 'clean/simplify/delete' wording is caught before a packet is routed. Files-only, Phase-0 shadow.

Externalize the Phase-2 rank factor table: load WEIGHTS/FACTORS from a new data/p0pgr_phase2_factors_v1.json registry, assert weights sum to 100 and every campaign move has a factor row (else DEGRADED), so new moves get ranked without editing Python. Still recommendation-only — no dispatch flags flipped, matches the script's own contract.

Receipt-ledger rollup page: extend audit_receipt_ledger's scan into a receipts_rollup_v1.py that aggregates receipts/ by schema/receipt_type with newest-timestamp, anomaly count, and per-type freshness, rendered as a single simple HTML page (per founder 'deliverables = simple web' rule) for onboarding/at-a-glance health. Read-only, exit 0 like the ledger.
